{{Infobox artifact
| name = Edict
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Edict]] is an object that was found.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Edict]] is a [[construct]] with a multicolored sun.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Edict]] logged out after screeching in laughter.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Edict]]'s sun imploded when she logged out.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
